name: Get All Users Successfully
description: Validates that the API successfully returns a list of all users and a count.

name: Response Contains Users Key
description: Validates that the successful response body always includes a top-level 'users' key.

name: Response Contains Count Key
description: Validates that the successful response body always includes a top-level 'count' key.

name: Get Users When No Users Exist
description: Validates that the API correctly returns an empty 'users' array and a count of 0 when no users are present in the system.

name: Attempt to Use POST Method
description: Validates that the API rejects requests using an unsupported HTTP method like POST.

name: Attempt to Use PUT Method
description: Validates that the API rejects requests using an unsupported HTTP method like PUT.

name: Attempt to Use DELETE Method
description: Validates that the API rejects requests using an unsupported HTTP method like DELETE.

name: Count Matches Users Array Length
description: Validates that the 'count' value in the response matches the number of user objects in the 'users' array.

name: Verify User Object Structure
description: Validates that each user object in the 'users' array contains the expected keys: id, name, email, role.

name: Request with Unsupported Accept Header
description: Validates that the API responds with 406 Not Acceptable when an unsupported 'Accept' header is provided.

name: Request to Non-Existent Subpath
description: Validates that the API returns a 404 Not Found error for requests to non-existent subpaths under /users.
